figma-console.description: Figma Console MCP — WebSocket bridge to the Figma desktop app. Requires Figma desktop running with the Console plugin installed. Primary Figma path — can expand component instance children, resolve variable bindings, reach internal layout properties. Fallback = Figma REST API (-0.30 GIGO penalty).

context7.description: Context7 MCP — up-to-date library documentation. Used by Library Researcher to audit dependency API surfaces.

_comments.ds-adapter-note: Design-system-specific MCP servers (DS tokens, DS components, etc.) are wired in by the active DS adapter's mcp.json, not here. See standards/ds-adapter.md. The adapter's MCP block is merged into this file at runtime.
_comments.figma-rest-note: There is no REST-API MCP server configured by default. The Design Analyst skill invokes REST directly via fetch when the Figma Console MCP canary fails. This keeps the fallback path explicit and GIGO-penalty-tracked rather than silently invisible.
_comments.package-names: Package names above are placeholders; replace with the actual npm package names when the MCP servers are installed.
